question: Reproduce the official Seurat 10x Visium mouse-brain sagittal-anterior workflow and publication-ready spatial QC, cluster, and Hpca/Ttr plots as a descriptive single-section teaching case.
research_question: Reproduce the official Seurat 10x Visium mouse-brain sagittal-anterior workflow and publication-ready spatial QC, cluster, and Hpca/Ttr plots as a descriptive single-section teaching case.
claim_limits: spots are mixtures and are not cells
expression-derived spot clusters are not cell types or spatially regularized domains
no mechanistic, interaction, or causal claims
